scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=20
scripts.dev:web: pnpm build:shared && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=20 --filter web-client --filter @lms/auth-service --filter @lms/course-service --filter @lms/learning-service --filter @lms/community-service --filter @lms/media-service --filter @lms/notification-service --filter @lms/payment-service --filter @lms/ai-service --filter @lms/env-validator --filter @lms/logger --filter @lms/types --filter @lms/kafka-client
scripts.dev:web:lite: pnpm build:shared && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=10 --filter web-client --filter @lms/auth-service --filter @lms/course-service --filter @lms/community-service --filter @lms/env-validator --filter @lms/logger --filter @lms/types --filter @lms/kafka-client
scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @lms/types build && pnpm --filter @lms/logger build && pnpm --filter @lms/env-validator build && pnpm --filter @lms/db-prisma build && pnpm --filter @lms/cache build && pnpm --filter @lms/kafka-client build
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm docker:up && pnpm setup:db && pnpm seed
scripts.setup:db: pnpm warmup:db && pnpm prisma:migrate:deploy:all && pnpm prisma:generate:all
